## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and future initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's SEO efforts are showing positive results, with increasing clicks and high CTRs for niche topics](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Exec plans to create targeted landing pages for specific use cases and industries, using AI to generate variations](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [New content ideas discussed, including pop culture leadership lessons and role-play scenarios for various industries](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

## Topics

### AI-Generated Web Content

  - [Elvis demonstrated Claude's ability to generate a full interactive webpage from a simple prompt](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Sean expressed amazement at the capabilities and potential impact on development teams](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Exec's Landing Page Strategy

  - [Plan to create a template page for specific use case + industry combinations (e.g., sales onboarding for medical device companies)](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Goal: Generate multiple variants (50-1000) to test market fit and conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Will use LinkedIn ads to target specific industries and roles, analyzing which pages get the most traction](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

### GrowthX SEO Performance Update

  - [Seeing positive trends in organic search traffic, with some days reaching 53 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Top performing pages include niche topics like "insurance agent roleplay" with high CTRs](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)

### Content Expansion Ideas

  - [Discussed adding "pop culture" leadership content (e.g., Bill Belichick management style, leadership lessons from The Office)](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Aim to target keywords with low difficulty that the ICP might search for](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Plan to add 5 of these topics per week to test performance and expand reach](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)

### Industry-Specific Content

  - [Focus on creating content for industries like insurance, real estate, and HVAC](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Discussion on how Exec's product could benefit small businesses in these sectors](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Exec's pricing model: $300/person/year for unlimited role-plays, with higher enterprise pricing](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)

### Viral Content Strategies

  - [Discussed potential for creating attention-grabbing content (e.g., PR disasters list, Elon Musk leadership style)](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Explored idea of AI role-play scenarios with famous figures to generate backlinks and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to deliver 20 new posts by end of the week, focusing on roleplay keywords and L\&D topics](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Exec to finalize design for new use case landing page template](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [GrowthX to assist in generating variations of the landing page once template is ready](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Explore creating content for insurance and real estate industries](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Consider developing viral content ideas for backlinks and traffic boost](https://fathom.video/share/mw67DuzDv1MvQPG4bTssYRZzJw-L3qys?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
